records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you got... the highest score...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you got... the highest score...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you got... the highest score...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's amazing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's amazing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's amazing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it. You're the best, Chifuyu. You make me so proud!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it. You're the best, Chifuyu. You make me so proud!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it. You're the best, Chifuyu. You make me so proud!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It may be a simulation, but you still vanquished so many of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It may be a simulation, but you still vanquished so many of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It may be a simulation, but you still vanquished so many of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am flattered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am flattered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am flattered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This dress is very comfortable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This dress is very comfortable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This dress is very comfortable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. Miss Laura would be glad to hear that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. Miss Laura would be glad to hear that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. Miss Laura would be glad to hear that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with the magic that cools my body temperature, it cannot get much better than this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And with the magic that cools my body temperature, it cannot get much better than this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And with the magic that cools my body temperature, it cannot get much better than this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen a score like this after taking over this facility!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen a score like this after taking over this facility!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen a score like this after taking over this facility!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you one of those high-grade Counters I've heard about?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you one of those high-grade Counters I've heard about?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you one of those high-grade Counters I've heard about?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are too generous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are too generous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are too generous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am not a great Counter like you think I am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am not a great Counter like you think I am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am not a great Counter like you think I am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I simply trained hard to protect my older sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I simply trained hard to protect my older sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I simply trained hard to protect my older sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The positive results may indicate that my hard work paid off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The positive results may indicate that my hard work paid off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The positive results may indicate that my hard work paid off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can have more confidence in yourself, Chifuyu.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can have more confidence in yourself, Chifuyu.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can have more confidence in yourself, Chifuyu.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone in the family knows how hard you are working.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone in the family knows how hard you are working.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone in the family knows how hard you are working.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Older... sister?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Older... sister?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Older... sister?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I am not a <color=#ffd34c>little lady</color>, I am this girl's <color=#ffd34c>older sister</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I am not a <color=#ffd34c>little lady</color>, I am this girl's <color=#ffd34c>older sister</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I am not a <color=#ffd34c>little lady</color>, I am this girl's <color=#ffd34c>older sister</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I apologize! I'm sorry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I apologize! I'm sorry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I apologize! I'm sorry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-by the way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-by the way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-by the way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe how easily you passed this battle simulation. Its technology was approved by the Administration, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe how easily you passed this battle simulation. Its technology was approved by the Administration, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe how easily you passed this battle simulation. Its technology was approved by the Administration, you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you interested in working as a Counter under the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you interested in working as a Counter under the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you interested in working as a Counter under the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This score and the battle records will be sent to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This score and the battle records will be sent to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This score and the battle records will be sent to the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you're going to get a good deal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you're going to get a good deal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you're going to get a good deal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I appreciate your kind words, but I must decline.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I appreciate your kind words, but I must decline.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I appreciate your kind words, but I must decline.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My duty is to protect the head of the family, my sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My duty is to protect the head of the family, my sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My duty is to protect the head of the family, my sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am merely glad that I am strong enough to earn the approval of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am merely glad that I am strong enough to earn the approval of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am merely glad that I am strong enough to earn the approval of the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will work harder to continue protecting Lady Nanahara.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will work harder to continue protecting Lady Nanahara.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will work harder to continue protecting Lady Nanahara.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem. Since she got the highest score, can we choose any prize we want?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem. Since she got the highest score, can we choose any prize we want?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem. Since she got the highest score, can we choose any prize we want?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! You can pick anything from these prizes here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! You can pick anything from these prizes here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! You can pick anything from these prizes here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmm... What do you think, Chifuyu?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmm... What do you think, Chifuyu?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmm... What do you think, Chifuyu?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A gift card for a department store, a gift card for a luxury restaurant, a free ticket for the amusement park...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A gift card for a department store, a gift card for a luxury restaurant, a free ticket for the amusement park...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A gift card for a department store, a gift card for a luxury restaurant, a free ticket for the amusement park...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which one do you want, Chifuyu?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which one do you want, Chifuyu?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which one do you want, Chifuyu?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am happy with whatever prize you would like.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am happy with whatever prize you would like.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am happy with whatever prize you would like.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I only cheered from behind. You should pick something that you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I only cheered from behind. You should pick something that you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I only cheered from behind. You should pick something that you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is difficult. To have to choose one out of all of these items.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is difficult. To have to choose one out of all of these items.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is difficult. To have to choose one out of all of these items.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shall take this one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shall take this one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shall take this one.
